Module com.cuatrifasico.battleshi
Package com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities

Class Ship

java.lang.Object
com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Ship
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class Ship extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a single ship placed on a board: its type, orientation, the coordinates it occupies and which of those coordinates have already been hit. A ship is considered sunk once every occupied coordinate has been hit.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Ship

      public Ship(ShipType shipType, Orientation orientation, Set<Coordinate> occupiedCells)
      Creates a ship of the given type occupying the given coordinates.
      Parameters:
      shipType - The ship category (defines its size).
      orientation - The orientation the ship was placed with.
      occupiedCells - The ordered set of coordinates this ship occupies, must match shipType.getSize() in count.

  • Method Details

    • getShipType

      public ShipType getShipType()
      Returns:
      The ship's category.

    • getOrientation

      public Orientation getOrientation()
      Returns:
      The ship's current orientation.

    • getOccupiedCells

      public Set<Coordinate> getOccupiedCells()
      Returns:
      An unmodifiable view of every coordinate occupied by this ship.

    • registerHit

      public boolean registerHit(Coordinate coordinate)
      Registers a hit on the given coordinate.
      Parameters:
      coordinate - The coordinate that was fired upon, must belong to this ship.
      Returns:
      true if this hit caused the ship to become fully sunk.

    • occupies

      public boolean occupies(Coordinate coordinate)
      Parameters:
      coordinate - The coordinate to check.
      Returns:
      true if this ship occupies the given coordinate.

    • isSunk

      public boolean isSunk()
      Returns:
      true if every occupied coordinate has been hit.
